creator: suttonj@interconnect.com.au
text:
dvi2tty displays dvi files on text only devices. This is from the CTAN 
archive. I couldn't find an actual tar file for this anywhere so the
ftp-server does one on the fly.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/dvi2tty.tar.gz

Please add this to the ports collection when/if you have a moment. If there
are any problems please email me. Thanks, Joel...
